# CaseBriefKit

> Free case brief template and maker for law school reading notes.

CaseBriefKit is an educational study aid for law students. It helps users organize case reading notes using FIRAC, IRAC, and CREAC formats. It is not legal advice.

## Core Pages

- [CaseBriefKit](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/): Free case brief template and maker for law school reading notes.
- [Case Brief Maker](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/case-brief-maker/): Generate FIRAC, IRAC, and CREAC case briefs in the browser.
- [Law School Case Brief Template](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/law-school-case-brief-template/): Free law school case brief template with maker, PDF, DOCX, outline, and examples.
- [Free Case Brief Template](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/free-case-brief-template/): Copy or download a free case brief template for law school.
- [Case Brief Template PDF](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/case-brief-template-pdf/): Download a free printable case brief template PDF.
- [Case Brief Template DOCX](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/case-brief-template-docx/): Download a free editable DOCX case brief template.
- [Case Brief Format](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/case-brief-format/): Compare common case brief formats for class notes.
- [IRAC Case Brief Example](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/irac-case-brief-example/): Review a short IRAC case brief example for law school notes.

## Commercial / Sponsor Pages

- [Sponsor Media Kit](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/sponsor-media-kit/): pilot sponsor placement details.
- [Advertise](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/advertise/): sponsor inquiry information.

## Files

- [Sitemap](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/sitemap.xml)
- [RSS Feed](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/feed.xml)
- [Free PDF Template](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/downloads/free-case-brief-template.pdf)
- [Free DOCX Template](https://neu-zha.github.io/casebriefkit-maker/downloads/free-case-brief-template.docx)

## Safety

- Educational study aid only.
- Not legal advice.
- No account is required.
- Do not enter confidential, privileged, or sensitive information.
